_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin deficiency-associated transcriptional dysregulation suggests a novel therapy for tibial pseudoarthrosis in NF1.

_contextSnippet: Hierarchical clustering analysis of the 258 differentially expressed genes identified 76 upregulated and 182 downregulated genes in pseudoarthrosis samples
details: Successfully performed hierarchical clustering analysis that distinguished control, iliac and pseudoarthrosis samples and identified 76 upregulated and 182 downregulated genes
